title: DomainDetail
description: DomainDetail schema from Palo Alto Networks DNS Security API

category.description: URL filtering category assigned to the domain (e.g., malware, phishing, command-and-control, business-and-economy).

risk_level.description: Risk level assessment for the domain.

risk_score.description: Numeric risk score from 0.0 (no risk) to 100.0 (critical risk).

dns_security_category.description: DNS Security category classification used for policy enforcement.

first_seen.description: Timestamp when the domain was first observed by DNS Security.

last_seen.description: Timestamp when the domain was most recently observed.

ip_addresses.description: Current IP addresses the domain resolves to.
